properties.displayName: Deny creation of Azure AI Foundry Hub
properties.description: Denies the creation of Azure AI Foundry Hub workspaces (Microsoft.MachineLearningServices/workspaces with kind 'Hub'). This policy helps enforce governance by preventing unauthorized or unintended deployment of AI Foundry Hubs.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy. Allowed values: Deny, Audit, Disabled.
